repair_history.diagnosis:
left and right sides of binary expression '<' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Comparison of opaque AADL type with real literal -> Replace Target_Speed with Target_Speed.val in all comparisons
Couldn't resolve reference to 'const_tar_speed': Undeclared variable used in guarantee -> Remove or declare const_tar_speed as a boolean variable
left side of binary expression '<=' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Comparison of opaque AADL type with real literal -> Replace Actual_Speed with Actual_Speed.val in all comparisons
Couldn't resolve reference to 'abs': abs function not available in AGREE context -> Replace abs with if-then-else to compute absolute value
left side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Arithmetic operation on opaque AADL type -> Replace Actual_Speed with Actual_Speed.val in all arithmetic

left and right sides of binary expression '>=' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: integer literal 150 used in real-valued comparison -> change 150.0 to 150.0
The 'then' and 'else' expressions are of non-matching types 'RealTypeDef' and 'BoolTypeDef': inconsistent return types in conditional expression -> rewrite conditional to return real values
right side of binary expression '=>' is of type 'real' but must be of type 'bool': non-boolean expression in implication -> correct conditional expression to return boolean
'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: port reference mismatch in connection -> replace 'Actual' with 'THROT.Actual' in connection
The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: port reference mismatch in connection -> replace 'Target' with 'CNTRL.Target' in connection

left and right sides of binary expression '<' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: type mismatch in comparison expression -> change 150.0 to 150.0
left and right sides of binary expression '>=' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: type mismatch in comparison expression -> change 0.0 to 0.0
'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: incompatible port types in connection -> remove or correct the connection AcSpeedToTop
The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: incompatible port types in connection -> remove or correct the connection TgSpeedToCntrl
'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: incompatible port types in connection -> remove or correct the connection SSToSM

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 18: left and right sides of binary expression '<' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: max_accel is declared as real but used in comparison with int-typed expressions due to implicit integer literals in conditionals -> change 'max_accel : real = 40.0' to 'max_accel : real = 40.0' (already correct) but rewrite the expression to use 40.0 directly in place of max_accel to avoid any type inference ambiguity
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 18: left and right sides of binary expression '>=' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Same as above: integer literals 0 in (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val) >= 0) are interpreted as int, conflicting with real-typed speed difference -> change '>= 0' to '>= 0.0' and '< 0' to '< 0.0' in the acceleration limit guarantee
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 32: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: THROT.Actual (from subcomponent) is not visible in component type contract; AGREE annex on Car type cannot reference subcomponent ports -> remove the entire guarantee 'acceleration limit' from the Car type annex because it references subcomponent internals; move it to Car.Car_Impl implementation annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 34: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: Target_Speed is Types::speed.speed_impl but CNTRL.Target is incompatible; this is a connection-level type mismatch, not an AGREE contract issue -> do not edit AGREE annex; this is an AADL connection error outside AGREE scope
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 39: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: SM.State_Out is not compatible with State_Signal; this is an AADL connection error, not an AGREE contract issue -> do not edit AGREE annex; this is an AADL connection error outside AGREE scope

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 29: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE annex references subcomponent port 'THROT.Actual' instead of visible component port 'Actual_Speed' -> Replace 'THROT.Actual' with 'Actual_Speed' in the AGREE annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 31: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: AGREE annex references subcomponent port 'CNTRL.Target' instead of visible component port 'Target_Speed' -> Replace 'CNTRL.Target' with 'Target_Speed' in the AGREE annex
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: 'State_Out' and 'State_Signal' have incompatible classifiers.: AGREE annex references subcomponent port 'SM.State_Out' instead of visible component port 'State_Signal' -> Replace 'SM.State_Out' with 'State_Signal' in the AGREE annex
